creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
diff -Nru xneur.orig/Makefile xneur/Makefile
--- xneur.orig/Makefile Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007
+++ xneur/Makefile      Wed Mar  7 16:42:52 2007
@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      XNeur
-PORTVERSION=   0.3
+PORTVERSION=   0.5.0
 CATEGORIES=    russian
-MASTER_SITES=  http://dists.xneur.ru/release-0.3.0/tgz/ CSME
+MASTER_SITES=  http://dists.xneur.ru/release-0.5.0/tgz/ CSME
+DISTNAME=      xneur-${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=    admin@lissyara.su
 COMMENT=       Auto keyboard switcher
@@ -20,8 +21,8 @@
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes

 post-patch:
-       @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/chmod/s|a\+|u+|' ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in
-       @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^am__strip_dir/s#`;#|sed -Ee 
"s/^(xneurrc|dict)$$$$/\\1.dist/"`;#' \
+       @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^am__strip_dir/s#`;#|sed -Ee \
+               
"s/^(dict.dist|proto|proto3|langdef|regexp|xneurrc|xneurrc-bg|xneurrc-uk|dict)$$$$/\\1.dist/"`;#' 
\
                ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in ${WRKSRC}/etc/*/Makefile.in

 post-install:
diff -Nru xneur.orig/distinfo xneur/distinfo
--- xneur.orig/distinfo Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007
+++ xneur/distinfo      Wed Mar  7 15:25:33 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 3732ef3a8d36064beac250b89a568aad
-SHA256 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 
6a42c5a8073d72d279756bfc43ec26d574277d4bca61fa0bf7da569a6eaff136
-SIZE (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 349569
+MD5 (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 919fcd7ab3adcad141ee77e3e341c212
+SHA256 (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 
5a974b18b3bc3fb4e8975a7527bfb8c4d5b3a7d36eef5d3058982268ca03b91d
+SIZE (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 377536
diff -Nru xneur.orig/patch.new xneur/patch.new
--- xneur.orig/patch.new        Wed Mar  7 16:32:29 2007
+++ xneur/patch.new     Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
@@ -1,164 +0,0 @@
-diff -Naur xneur/Makefile xneur.new/Makefile
---- xneur/Makefile     Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007
-+++ xneur.new/Makefile Wed Mar  7 15:41:16 2007
-@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
- #
-
- PORTNAME=     XNeur
--PORTVERSION=  0.3
-+PORTVERSION=  0.5.0
- CATEGORIES=   russian
--MASTER_SITES= http://dists.xneur.ru/release-0.3.0/tgz/ CSME
-+MASTER_SITES= http://dists.xneur.ru/release-0.5.0/tgz/ CSME
-+DISTNAME=     xneur-${PORTVERSION}
-
- MAINTAINER=   admin@lissyara.su
- COMMENT=      Auto keyboard switcher
-@@ -20,8 +21,9 @@
- USE_LDCONFIG= yes
-
- post-patch:
--      @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/chmod/s|a\+|u+|' ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in
--      @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^am__strip_dir/s#`;#|sed -Ee 
"s/^(xneurrc|dict)$$$$/\\1.dist/"`;#' \
-+#     @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/chmod/s|a\+|u+|' ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in
-+      @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^am__strip_dir/s#`;#|sed -Ee \
-+              
"s/^(dict.dist|proto|proto3|langdef|regexp|xneurrc|xneurrc-bg|xneurrc-uk|dict)$$$$/\\1.dist/"`;#' 
\
-               ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in ${WRKSRC}/etc/*/Makefile.in
-
- post-install:
-diff -Naur xneur/distinfo xneur.new/distinfo
---- xneur/distinfo     Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007
-+++ xneur.new/distinfo Wed Mar  7 15:25:33 2007
-@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
--MD5 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 3732ef3a8d36064beac250b89a568aad
--SHA256 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 
6a42c5a8073d72d279756bfc43ec26d574277d4bca61fa0bf7da569a6eaff136
--SIZE (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 349569
-+MD5 (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 919fcd7ab3adcad141ee77e3e341c212
-+SHA256 (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 
5a974b18b3bc3fb4e8975a7527bfb8c4d5b3a7d36eef5d3058982268ca03b91d
-+SIZE (xneur-0.5.0.tar.bz2) = 377536
-diff -Naur xneur/patch.new xneur.new/patch.new
---- xneur/patch.new    Wed Mar  7 16:32:29 2007
-+++ xneur.new/patch.new        Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
-@@ -1,38 +0,0 @@
--diff -Naur xneur/Makefile xneur.new/Makefile
----- xneur/Makefile    Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007
--+++ xneur.new/Makefile        Wed Mar  7 15:41:16 2007
--@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@

-- PORTNAME=    XNeur
---PORTVERSION= 0.3

--+             
"s/^(dict.dist|proto|proto3|langdef|regexp|xneurrc|xneurrc-bg|xneurrc-uk|dict)$$$$/\\1.dist/"`;#' 
\
--              ${WRKSRC}/etc/Makefile.in ${WRKSRC}/etc/*/Makefile.in

-- post-install:

----- xneur/distinfo    Wed Mar  7 15:14:37 2007

rm -f %D/etc/xneur/en/dict; fi
- etc/xneur/en/dict.dist
- @exec if [ ! -f %D/etc/xneur/en/dict ] ; then cp -p %D/%F %B/dict; fi
--etc/xneur/en/proto

%D/etc/xneur/en/langdef.dist; then rm -f %D/etc/xneur/en/langdef; fi

%B/langdef; fi

rm -f %D/etc/xneur/ru/dict; fi
- etc/xneur/ru/dict.dist
